startBeforeEnd: Start time must be before end time.
invalidCalendar: Invalid Tasks calendar. Select one you own or can edit.
usernameLengthRange: username must be between 3 and 64 characters.
usernameAllowedCharacters: username can only contain letters, numbers, dots, and underscores.
emailMaxLength: email must be at most 254 characters.
emailMustBeValid: email must be a valid email address.
profilePictureMimeTypes: Only JPG, PNG, GIF, and WEBP images are allowed.
profilePictureFileSize: Profile picture must be 2MB or smaller.
themeColorAllowedValues: themeColor must be one of the supported theme colors.
